---
id: mesh-tenant-delete-v-4
title: "Delete tenant"
description: "Submits an existing meshTenant for deletion. meshTenant deletion might involve manual action on operator side, so the meshTenant might not be immediately deleted but rather marked for deletion."
sidebar_label: "Delete tenant"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api/meshstack-api-documentation

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete tenant"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshtenants/a5302cb0-5d3b-4185-a169-4fd6a428dd18"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Submits an existing meshTenant for deletion. meshTenant deletion might involve manual action on operator side, so the meshTenant might not be immediately deleted but rather marked for deletion.

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}

  responses={{"202":{"description":"202"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
